title: What Is Inositol? Why Women Over 40 Are Talking About This Nutrient
seo_title: What Is Inositol for Women Over 40?
meta_description: Inositol is gaining attention for insulin resistance, hormonal balance, and mood support after 40. Learn what the research shows and how myo-inositol works for women.
tags: Hormones, Insulin Resistance, Inositol, Menopause, Supplements, Women Over 40
